d1e1_first_customer.speaker: Mentor
d1e1_first_customer.text: Welcome to your laundromat! Your first customer just walked in carrying a heavy laundry bag. First impressions matter.

d1e1_greet.speaker: You
d1e1_greet.text: The customer looks around, unsure where to start...

choices.text: Greet them warmly and explain the machine process
Point to the machines and let them figure it out
Stay behind the counter and keep sorting laundry

d1e1_good_outcome.speaker: Customer
d1e1_good_outcome.text: Oh, thank you so much! This is my first time at a laundromat. You're very helpful!

d1e1_neutral_outcome.speaker: Customer
d1e1_neutral_outcome.text: Right... I'll figure it out. Thanks I guess.

d1e1_bad_outcome.speaker: Customer
d1e1_bad_outcome.text: Excuse me? I've been standing here. Forget it, I'll go somewhere else.

d1e1_result_good.speaker: Mentor
d1e1_result_good.text: Excellent! A warm welcome creates loyal customers. First impressions build lasting relationships.

d1e1_result_neutral.speaker: Mentor
d1e1_result_neutral.text: Not terrible, but proactive service could have turned that into a loyal regular.

d1e1_result_bad.speaker: Mentor
d1e1_result_bad.text: That customer is never coming back. In business, every person who walks in is an opportunity.

d1r_machine_breakdown.speaker: Staff
d1r_machine_breakdown.text: Boss! Machine #3 just stopped mid-cycle. There's water everywhere and a customer's clothes are stuck inside!

d1r_machine_b.speaker: You
d1r_machine_b.text: Water is pooling on the floor and the affected customer looks panicked. The other customers are watching.

choices.text: Calm the customer first, then fix the machine
Jump straight into fixing the machine
Offer the customer a free wash and refund
Redirect them to another machine and deal with it later

d1r_machine_c_calm.speaker: Customer
d1r_machine_c_calm.text: Thank you for checking on me first. I was really worried about my clothes. I feel much better knowing you care.

d1r_machine_c_fix.speaker: Staff
d1r_machine_c_fix.text: You fixed it! But the customer was pretty upset about being ignored during the chaos.

d1r_machine_c_refund.speaker: Customer
d1r_machine_c_refund.text: A full refund and a free wash? That's above and beyond. You've earned a loyal customer today.

d1r_machine_c_ignore.speaker: Customer
d1r_machine_c_ignore.text: No apology? Nothing? I'm never coming back here. This is terrible service.

d1r_machine_result_calm.speaker: Mentor
d1r_machine_result_calm.text: People first, then problems. Calming the customer before solving the issue showed genuine care. That's leadership.

d1r_machine_result_fix.speaker: Mentor
d1r_machine_result_fix.text: You fixed the machine quickly, but the customer felt neglected. Technical skills matter, but people skills matter more.

d1r_machine_result_refund.speaker: Mentor
d1r_machine_result_refund.text: Generous service recovery builds incredible loyalty. That customer will tell everyone about your generosity.

d1r_machine_result_ignore.speaker: Mentor
d1r_machine_result_ignore.text: Ignoring problems doesn't make them disappear. Acknowledging issues builds trust you can't buy.

d1r_spilled_detergent.speaker: Customer
d1r_spilled_detergent.text: Oh no! I accidentally knocked over my detergent bottle. It's everywhere! I'm so sorry!

d1r_spilled_b.speaker: You
d1r_spilled_b.text: Soap is spreading across the floor. It's getting slippery and other customers are noticing.

choices.text: Reassure the customer and clean it together
Clean it yourself, tell them it's fine
Ask them to clean it up themselves

d1r_spilled_c_together.speaker: Customer
d1r_spilled_c_together.text: You helped me clean it up? Most places would just yell at me. I'm definitely coming back!

d1r_spilled_c_clean.speaker: Customer
d1r_spilled_c_clean.text: You're not even mad? Thank you so much. I was so embarrassed. You handled that really well.

d1r_spilled_c_blame.speaker: Customer
d1r_spilled_c_blame.text: Wow. I said I was sorry. I'll just leave and never come back.

d1r_spilled_result_together.speaker: Mentor
d1r_spilled_result_together.text: Teamwork during accidents builds community. You turned an embarrassing moment into a connection.

d1r_spilled_result_clean.speaker: Mentor
d1r_spilled_result_clean.text: Grace under pressure earns respect. That customer will remember how you made them feel, not the accident.

d1r_spilled_result_blame.speaker: Mentor
d1r_spilled_result_blame.text: Blaming customers for honest mistakes drives them away. A little empathy goes a long way.

d1r_kind_stranger.speaker: Stranger
d1r_kind_stranger.text: Hi, I don't need to do laundry today. I just wanted to say this place has a wonderful energy. You should be proud.

d1r_kind_b.speaker: You
d1r_kind_b.text: A stranger came in just to offer encouragement. How do you respond?

choices.text: Thank them warmly and offer a free coffee
Thank them genuinely and ask what brought them in
Thank them and share your story briefly
Thank them briefly and get back to work

d1r_kind_c_gift.speaker: Stranger
d1r_kind_c_gift.text: A free coffee? That's so generous! I'm telling everyone about this place. You just made my whole day!

d1r_kind_c_ask.speaker: Stranger
d1r_kind_c_ask.text: I walked past and felt pulled in by the warmth of this place. It's rare and it's entirely your doing.

d1r_kind_c_share.speaker: Stranger
d1r_kind_c_share.text: Your story is inspiring! People need to know about this place. Can I share it on social media?

d1r_kind_c_brief.speaker: Stranger
d1r_kind_c_brief.text: Of course, you're busy. Keep up the great work. This place deserves to thrive.

d1r_kind_result_gift.speaker: Mentor
d1r_kind_result_gift.text: Generosity toward strangers creates powerful word of mouth. You just gained a brand ambassador.

d1r_kind_result_ask.speaker: Mentor
d1r_kind_result_ask.text: Genuine curiosity builds community. Understanding why people love your business helps you grow it.

d1r_kind_result_share.speaker: Mentor
d1r_kind_result_share.text: Authentic stories travel further than any advertisement. Organic advocacy is the most credible marketing.

d1r_kind_result_brief.speaker: Mentor
d1r_kind_result_brief.text: Efficiency matters, but human connection has compounding value. Sometimes slowing down briefly is the most productive thing you can do.

d1e3_supplier_call.speaker: Mentor
d1e3_supplier_call.text: Your detergent supplier just called. They're offering a bulk discount on laundry supplies.

d1e3_supplier_b.speaker: You
d1e3_supplier_b.text: A bulk deal could save money, but it's a lot of cash upfront...

choices.text: Take the bulk deal — stock up on supplies
Order just enough for now — play it safe
Skip the order — save the cash

d1e3_supplier_bulk.speaker: Supplier
d1e3_supplier_bulk.text: Excellent choice! Your supply closet will be fully stocked. Customers love a clean, well-supplied laundromat.

d1e3_supplier_safe.speaker: Supplier
d1e3_supplier_safe.text: Alright, small order coming your way. Should arrive tomorrow.

d1e3_supplier_skip.speaker: Supplier
d1e3_supplier_skip.text: Your call. But if you run out of detergent, customers won't be happy.

d1e3_supplier_result_bulk.speaker: Mentor
d1e3_supplier_result_bulk.text: Bold move! Cash flow took a hit, but a fully stocked laundromat signals reliability to customers.

d1e3_supplier_result_safe.speaker: Mentor
d1e3_supplier_result_safe.text: Cautious but reasonable. Managing cash flow carefully is a real skill in business.

d1e3_supplier_result_skip.speaker: Mentor
d1e3_supplier_result_skip.text: Saving cash is tempting, but customers notice when you're out of basic supplies. Balance is key.

d1e4_staff_training.speaker: Mentor
d1e4_staff_training.text: Your part-time staff member wants to learn how to handle machine maintenance. A great opportunity to build skills.

d1e4_staff_b.speaker: Staff
d1e4_staff_b.text: Boss, I'd really like to learn how to fix the machines when they break. It would help both of us.

choices.text: Train them personally — invest in their growth
Let them watch and learn on their own time
Tell them you're too busy right now

d1e4_staff_train.speaker: Staff
d1e4_staff_train.text: Thank you so much! I feel much more confident now. I'll take good care of the machines.

d1e4_staff_watch.speaker: Staff
d1e4_staff_watch.text: I'll learn what I can. Would be nice to have some proper training someday though.

d1e4_staff_refuse.speaker: Staff
d1e4_staff_refuse.text: Oh... okay. I understand you're busy. Maybe another time.

d1e4_staff_result_train.speaker: Mentor
d1e4_staff_result_train.text: Investing in your team's growth builds loyalty and capability. A trained staff member is an asset.

d1e4_staff_result_watch.speaker: Mentor
d1e4_staff_result_watch.text: Some training is better than none, but formal investment signals you value their development.

d1e4_staff_result_refuse.speaker: Mentor
d1e4_staff_result_refuse.text: Neglecting staff development breeds resentment. Your team is your greatest resource — invest in them.

d1e5_day_end.speaker: Mentor
d1e5_day_end.text: End of your first day! A regular customer wants to thank you for your service today.

d1e5_customer_b.speaker: Customer
d1e5_customer_b.text: I've been coming here for years. Today was the best service I've ever had. Can I give you some feedback?

choices.text: Gladly accept their feedback and thank them
Listen politely but don't engage deeply
Brush them off — you're tired from a long day

d1e5_customer_feedback.speaker: Customer
d1e5_customer_feedback.text: That means a lot. Your friendly attitude is why I keep coming back. Keep doing what you're doing!

d1e5_customer_listen.speaker: Customer
d1e5_customer_listen.text: Well, I'll keep it brief then. Thanks for listening anyway. See you next time.

d1e5_customer_brush.speaker: Customer
d1e5_customer_brush.text: Oh... okay. I was just trying to help. Maybe I'll try the laundromat down the street next time.

d1e5_result_feedback.speaker: Mentor
d1e5_result_feedback.text: Actively seeking and accepting feedback builds trust. Customers feel valued when you listen. Great way to end day one!

d1e5_result_listen.speaker: Mentor
d1e5_result_listen.text: Listening is good, but engagement is better. Next time, show genuine interest in what they have to say.

d1e5_result_brush.speaker: Mentor
d1e5_result_brush.text: Dismissing loyal customers is dangerous. A moment of tiredness can undo weeks of good service.
